properties.description: Supervisa los intentos de acceso no autorizados desde direcciones IP no fiables. Esto puede incluir intentos de acceso a puertos restringidos o no utilizados, que pueden indicar intentos de escaneo o ataque.
properties.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "AzureFirewallNetworkRule"
| where msg_s contains "Deny"
| where msg_s !contains "10.12"
| where msg_s !contains "10.10"
| where msg_s !contains "10.30"
| where msg_s !contains "10.0"
| parse msg_s with Protocol " request from " SourceIP " to " DestinationIP ". Action: " Action
| extend
    SourceIP = iif(SourceIP contains ":", strcat_array(split(SourceIP, ":", 0), ""), SourceIP),
    SourcePort = iif(SourceIP contains ":", strcat_array(split(SourceIP, ":", 1), ""), ""),
    DestinationIP = iif(DestinationIP contains ":", strcat_array(split(DestinationIP, ":", 0), ""), DestinationIP),
    DestinationPort = iif(SourceIP contains ":", strcat_array(split(DestinationIP, ":", 1), ""), ""),
    Action = iif(Action contains ".", strcat_array(split(Action, ".", 0), ""), Action)
| project
    msg_s,
    TimeGenerated,
    Protocol,
    SourceIP,
    SourcePort,
    DestinationIP,
    DestinationPort,
    Action
| summarize EventCount = count() by SourceIP// SourcePort, Protocol, DestinationIP, DestinationPort, Action, TimeGenerated
| where EventCount > 30
properties.displayName: DEL0039 - Deteccion de trafico no autorizado
